title: Enforce structure with JSON Schema validation
description: Attach a $jsonSchema validator so a flexible document model still guarantees required fields and types.
body: Use when a collection needs guarantees on shape without giving up document flexibility. Do not rely solely on application code to enforce required fields and types; a second writer or a manual mongosh insert bypasses it. Actions: attach a $jsonSchema validator with validationLevel strict and validationAction error so non-conforming writes are rejected at the server, and verify by attempting an invalid insert. Validation signals include a bad document raising a DocumentValidationFailure and conforming writes passing unchanged. Risk boundary: turning on strict validation against a collection with legacy non-conforming documents blocks updates to them, so audit existing data and use validationLevel moderate during migration.
